Resolution: Adjusted suction line, checked NPSH and removed blockage
Replaced bearings and performed vibration alignment check
Reprimed pump and tightened suction fittings; replaced gasket
Replaced seal kit and verified leak tightness

Description: Cavitation due to low suction pressure
Resolution: Adjusted suction line, checked NPSH and removed blockage
Replaced bearings and performed vibration alignment check
Reprimed pump and tightened suction fittings; replaced gasket
Cleaned valve internals and installed upstream strainer
Checked wiring and replaced actuator control board

Description: Seal degradation causing elevated casing temperature
Resolution: Installed new seal kit and inspected seal chamber for damage.
Replaced worn seal, checked lubrication condition, and performed temperature test run.

Description: Pump temperature rise due to worn seal and friction
Resolution: Replaced seal components and corrected friction point during reassembly.

Description: Control unit overheating due to cooling failure
Resolution: Restored cooling airflow and replaced faulty cooling fan.

Description: Electrical cooling failure causing valve actuator temperature rise
Resolution: Cleaned ventilation path and repaired cooling circuit connection.

Description: Actuator overheating from failed cooling assembly
Resolution: Replaced cooling module and verified actuator operating temperature.

Description: Cooling fault leading to intermittent electrical shutdown
Resolution: Repaired cooling system power supply and tested continuous operation.

Description: Valve control overheating caused by inadequate cooling
Resolution: Restored cooling function and inspected actuator enclosure for heat damage.

Description: Abnormal vibration due to bearing failure
Resolution: Replaced failed bearings and performed shaft alignment check.

Description: Bearing wear causing noise and vibration in pump
Resolution: Installed new bearing set and rebalanced rotating components.

Description: Pump bearing failure resulting in elevated vibration levels
Resolution: Removed damaged bearings and verified housing fit before reassembly.

Description: Excessive shaft vibration caused by worn bearings
Resolution: Replaced bearings and completed post-maintenance vibration measurement.

Description: Bearing degradation leading to unstable pump operation
Resolution: Changed bearing assembly and confirmed smooth operation during trial run.
